title: Bug (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Razorbug-NEGWT.png|thumb|right|250px|A Yuuzhan Vong razor bug]]
'''Bug''' can refer to more than one thing:

==Canon==
*'''Bug''', another name for an [[insect]].
*'''"[[Bug (Sídi)|Bug]],"''' the nickname of a [[Sídi]] girl
*'''[[Corellian gluttonbug]]'''
*'''[[Needlebug]]'''

==Legends==
*'''Bug''' was the nickname of [[Hardin]], a cousin to [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Zannah]]
*'''Bug''', a nickname for [[projectile biot]]s, a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] weapon
*'''[[Corellian gluttonbug/Legends|Corellian gluttonbug]]'''
**'''[[Nang hul|Thud bug]]''', a Yuuzhan Vong concussive projectile, and the basis of the all other bug weapons
***'''[[Blast bug]]''', the Yuuzhan Vong analog of a guided [[missile]]
***'''[[Razor bug]]''', the Yuuzhan Vong analog of a throwing [[knife]]
***'''[[Snap bug]]''', the Yuuzhan Vong analog of a [[flash grenade]]
*'''[[Needlebug/Legends|Needlebug]]'''
*Any one of numerous species of [[Bug (creature)|insects]].

==Real world==
*"'''[[Bug (short story)|Bug]]'''", a short story in ''[[The Clone Wars: Stories of Light and Dark]]''

{{Disambig}}
